methods.description: Process for analyzing water samples for isotopic composition using Picarro water isotope analyzers, calibrated with internal and international standards.

steps.description: Precipitation and groundwater samples were stored in 3.5 ml crimp-top glass vials, and seawater and groundwater samples were stored in 60 mL amber bottles capped and sealed with parafilm.
steps.searchable_summary: store water samples in appropriate vials and bottles

steps.description: Samples from April 2016 onward were analyzed for both δ 18 O and δ 2 H at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign on a Picarro L-2140i water isotope analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze water samples for isotopes using Picarro L-2140i

steps.description: Previous samples, reported in Conroy et al. (2017), were measured on a Picarro L-2130i water isotope analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze previous water samples using Picarro L-2130i

steps.description: Samples were calibrated with three internal standards, which were in turn calibrated to Vienna Standard Mean Ocean Water 2 (VSMOW2), Greenland Ice Sheet Project (GISP) and Standard Light Antarctic Precipitation 2 (SLAP2) standards.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate samples with internal and international standards

steps.description: We applied corrections as discussed in Van Geldern and Barth, (2012) to account for memory effects and instrument drift.
steps.searchable_summary: apply corrections for memory effects and instrument drift

methods.description: Procedure for measuring seawater salinity using conductivity meters, calibrated with standard solutions.

steps.description: From October 2012-September 2020, seawater salinity was measured on a Thermo Scientific Orion Star A212 benchtop conductivity meter.
steps.searchable_summary: measure seawater salinity using Orion Star A212

steps.description: The meter was calibrated every 10 samples with 50.0 mS/cm certified conductivity solution.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate conductivity meter with standard solution

steps.description: Twenty mL samples were measured 5 times at a constant temperature of 25.0°C.
steps.searchable_summary: measure samples multiple times at constant temperature

steps.description: Salinity values in PSU are reported as the average of the five measurements.
From October 2020 onward, salinity was measured on a Guildline Autosal 8400B, using IAPSO standard seawater (34.994 PSU) as a daily standard.
steps.searchable_summary: measure salinity using Guildline Autosal 8400B with daily standard
